signatureAbility.signatureDescription: The game's top defenders excel in all situations. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their chance of defeating run blocks, and disrupting catches via tackles.
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Defenders with this ability can reach out of engaged blocks to tackle or sack nearby ballcarriers.
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Pass rushers with this ability must spend twice as much stamina to perform a move but are granted dominant wins
Defenders with this ability do not need to spend stamina on shed attempts during a run play
Pass rushers with this ability pay a reduced stamina cost for each move they attempt
Defenders with this ability will ignore one bar of blocker resistance when attempting swim/club pass rush moves
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in deep zone coverage, 20+ yards from the LoS and outside the hash marks.
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break the first tackle attempt on kick returns
Players with this ability have an increased chance to catch passes that have been tipped into the air.
Ballcarriers with this ability have more powerful truck and stiff arm animations and a larger timing window for perfect attempts.
Ballcarriers with this ability will replenish a portion of their stamina upon successfully performing any skill move
Running backs with this ability have better catch in traffic and route running when coming out of the backfield against linebackers and linemen.
Defenders with this ability have higher chance to catch uncontested interceptions, and they have unlimited stamina on the return (until using a special move or breaking a tackle).
Players with this ability are more likely to succeed at and attempt diving catches and swats.
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in deep zone coverage, 20+ yards from the LoS and outside the hash marks.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all lob or touch passes (except high/low and cross-body throws).
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws inside the numbers (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have a reduced chance to be impacted by throw penalties caused by defensive pressure while their feet are set in the pocket
Pass rushers with this ability will heal some of their fatigue after sacking the QB
Defenders with this ability are granted a free pass rush move once per play after spending stamina to perform one
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability have an increased number of blocker resistance points
Pass rushers with this ability will heal some of their fatigue after sacking the QB
Defenders with this ability will dominantly win run blocks when they correctly use the Guess Play adjustment to predict a run. Incorrect guesses will result in a loss.
Defenders with this ability will frequently prevent additional yardage gains while tackling
